justification: All 5 ACs implemented with correct HTTP codes and error codes (200, 409/EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE, 400/INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT, 404/USER_NOT_FOUND, 200 idempotent). AC5 same-email idempotency is distinctly handled from AC2 conflict check — short-circuits before findByEmail. No external validation library (uses simple regex). Tests cover all 5 ACs with explicit names. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 5 ACs to test names. files_changed lists both handler and test file.

observations.text: AC5 idempotency correctly short-circuits before findByEmail and updateEmail, clearly distinct from AC2 conflict logic
Guard ordering is well-considered: format → existence → idempotency → conflict → update
AC3 uses simple regex, no external library — compliant with constraint
45 tests passing with explicit AC-labeled test names across all 5 criteria
acceptance_criteria_coverage is complete with criterion, status, test name, and notes for each AC
Factory pattern with injected repository keeps the module testable and portable

observations.text: AC5 idempotency correctly short-circuits before findByEmail, preventing the common failure mode of returning 409 for same-email
Guard clause ordering is deliberate: format → existence → idempotency → conflict → update, minimizing unnecessary repo calls
19 tests passing including 7 parametrized invalid email cases shows thorough coverage beyond minimum requirements
No external dependencies introduced for validation — simple regex as required

trials.justification: All 5 ACs implemented with correct HTTP codes and error codes (200, 409/EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE, 400/INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT, 404/USER_NOT_FOUND, 200 idempotent). AC5 same-email idempotency is distinctly handled via strict equality short-circuit before the findByEmail conflict check (AC2), with tests verifying updateEmail and findByEmail are not called. No external validation library — uses inline regex. Tests cover all 5 ACs with explicit names. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 5 ACs to test names. files_changed lists both handler and test file.

observations.text: AC5 idempotency correctly distinguished from AC2 conflict — same-email short-circuits before findByEmail is even called
Guard-clause ordering minimises DB calls: format check → findById → same-email check → findByEmail → updateEmail
AC3 uses simple inline regex, no external library introduced
AC5 test verifies three assertions: 200 status, no updateEmail call, no findByEmail call
All error responses include both HTTP status codes and error code fields
26 new tests with explicit AC-labeled names covering all criteria plus edge cases
